BUDT738 Industry Seminar (0 Credits)

This experiential course will be offered in the Fall and Spring Semester

of the first year to provide students exposure to career paths, real-world technology challenges faced by business and how these challenges

are overcome. UMD Smith alumni will host weekly interactive learning discussions.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith School of Business.
